title: Contract 2 — adapter -> thin waist call (per hook fire) (RFC-008 F22, F55/F44)
description: The call the plugin adapter makes into enforce-contract.mjs. command is required for Bash; tool_args is required for non-Bash tools. event_id/events_version drive the F44 runtime event-vocabulary hard-reject.

tool.description: harness-specific tool name (Bash, Edit, Write, MultiEdit, ...)

command.description: raw command text; required for Bash

tool_args.description: raw tool args; required for non-Bash

event_id.description: harness event that fired; event_id in events[].id (F44 runtime hard-reject)

events_version.description: sha256 matching loaded events.json (F44 drift check)
